title: Expert Talk on Natural Language Processing Applications Using ML and DL Techniques
content: Event Date: 08th April 2024 The Natural Language Processing (NLP) Research Group is delighted to announce an expert talk on NLP applications aimed at equipping participants with comprehensive understanding and practical skills in utilizing NLP techniques through Machine Learning (ML) and Deep Learning (DL) approaches. The event will provide attendees with a deep dive into fundamental concepts of NLP, covering text preprocessing, feature extraction, sentiment analysis, and named entity recognition! This event is a fantastic opportunity for students to: The talk has featured hands-on sessions where students and Faculty gain proficiency in implementing NLP applications using popular libraries such as NLTK, SpaCy, TensorFlow, or PyTorch. Through interactive exercises and real-world examples, attendees will learn how to leverage these libraries to preprocess text data, extract meaningful features and analyze sentiments. Overall, the event promises to be an enriching experience for anyone interested in exploring the fascinating world of Natural Language Processing. Whether you are a seasoned researcher, a student eager to learn, or a professional looking to enhance your skill set, this expert talk on NLP applications is sure to provide valuable insights and practical tools to take your NLP journey to the next level. Join us and embark on a transformative learning experience that will empower you to harness the power of NLP and drive innovation in your projects and endeavors. Mentor Name – Dr. Shachi Mall Department Name – School of Computer Science and Engineering
